notableEvents.label: Brett Baty GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty grounds into a double play, pitcher Tyler Mahle to catcher Patrick Bailey to first baseman Jerar Encarnacion. Juan Soto out at home. Bo Bichette to 3rd. Luis Robert Jr. to 2nd. Brett Baty out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brett Baty rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty grounds into a double play, pitcher Tyler Mahle to catcher Patrick Bailey to first baseman Jerar Encarnacion. Juan Soto out at home. Bo Bichette to 3rd. Luis Robert Jr. to 2nd. Brett Baty out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luis Robert Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Robert Jr. grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Jerar Encarnacion. Bo Bichette out at 2nd. Luis Robert Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge grounds into a double play, pitcher JT Brubaker to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Jerar Encarnacion. Mark Vientos out at 2nd. Carson Benge out at 1st.
